name: Beard's Beer Batter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolks, salt, vegetable oil, and beer until well mixed.
2. Stir in flour to form a batter. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours.
3. Just before frying, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
5. Fry vegetables (or fish fillets) in oil heated to 360°F until cooked through.
This recipe makes 4 servings.
